examples: He mistakenly believed that his family would stand by him.
He says they mistakenly believed the standard licences they held were sufficient.
Students sometimes mistakenly assume that the section contains literature books.
The daughter of a writer, Rufina was mistakenly pronounced dead on her 19th birthday following a cataleptic attack.
Doctors not familiar with ciguatera sometimes mistakenly give a diagnosis of chronic fatigue syndrome.
